evals.prompt: How should I implement common documentation best practices?
evals.expected_output: **"Why" over "What"**: Comments should explain non-obvious intent. Code should describe the logic.

evals.prompt: What are the common anti-patterns to avoid in common documentation?
evals.expected_output: **Docstrings**: Use triple-slash (Dart/Swift) or standard JSDoc (TS/JS) for all public functions and classes.

evals.prompt: Give me a quick-start example for common documentation.
evals.expected_output: **Maintenance**: Delete "commented-out" code immediately; use Git history for retrieval.

should_not_trigger: Set up a basic common project from scratch
How do I install common dependencies?
Configure CI/CD for an unrelated platform
